nodes.label: SectionHeader.astro
nodes.description: Componente Astro reutilizable. Two-column section header con eyebrow, title, subtitle y paragraphs[]. CSS en section-redesign.css (.sh--split / .sh--center).

nodes.label: index.astro
nodes.description: Página principal MANEXT. Imports: Layout, Hero, SectionHeader. Secciones: hero, services (4 cards), about, extinguishers (6 cards), clients, testimonials, faq+cotizacion, pf-strip nav, scripts. CSS en section-redesign.css.

nodes.label: section-redesign.css
nodes.description: CSS global de componentes rediseñados: SectionHeader (.sh), pre-footer strip (.pf-strip/.pf-card), grids (.services-grid, .extinguishers-grid), Hero variants.
